name: 75oz Glass Jar and Lid - Threshold™: Clear Food Storage, Candy & Cookie Jar, Hand Wash, 8.4" Height
description:
Complete your kitchen storage needs with this 75-ounce Glass Jar and Lid from Threshold™. This glass jar makes a must-have pantry or kitchen essential. It features a classic design that fits well with any color scheme or kitchen decor, and a clear construction for easy identification of stored contents. The practical jar makes an ideal choice for storing a variety of food items and dry ingredients that are used in your kitchen. It includes a secure lid cover that helps to keep its contents fresh, and a knob-style top handle that allows for easy open and use.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
